ddl.using:
EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM "chats" 
        WHERE "chats"."chat_id" = "messages"."chat_id" 
        AND "chats"."user_id" = (select auth.uid())
      )
ddl.name: authenticated can read messages from own chats

ddl.withCheck:
EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM "chats" 
        WHERE "chats"."chat_id" = "messages"."chat_id" 
        AND "chats"."user_id" = (select auth.uid())
      )
ddl.name: authenticated can insert messages to own chats

ddl.value: CASE WHEN "parts"."type" = 'text' THEN "parts"."text_text" IS NOT NULL ELSE TRUE END
ddl.name: text_text_required_if_type_is_text

ddl.value: CASE WHEN "parts"."type" = 'reasoning' THEN "parts"."reasoning_text" IS NOT NULL ELSE TRUE END
ddl.name: reasoning_text_required_if_type_is_reasoning

ddl.value: CASE WHEN "parts"."type" = 'file' THEN "parts"."file_mediaType" IS NOT NULL AND "parts"."file_url" IS NOT NULL ELSE TRUE END
ddl.name: file_fields_required_if_type_is_file

ddl.value: CASE WHEN "parts"."type" = 'source_url' THEN "parts"."source_url_sourceId" IS NOT NULL AND "parts"."source_url_url" IS NOT NULL ELSE TRUE END
ddl.name: source_url_fields_required_if_type_is_source_url

ddl.value: CASE WHEN "parts"."type" = 'source_document' THEN "parts"."source_document_sourceId" IS NOT NULL AND "parts"."source_document_mediaType" IS NOT NULL AND "parts"."source_document_title" IS NOT NULL ELSE TRUE END
ddl.name: source_document_fields_required_if_type_is_source_document

ddl.using:
EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM "messages" 
        JOIN "chats" ON "chats"."chat_id" = "messages"."chat_id"
        WHERE "messages"."message_id" = "parts"."message_id" 
        AND "chats"."user_id" = (select auth.uid())
      )
